---
title: "Research"
---

# Research

My research focuses on applying advanced biostatistical, epidemiological, and artificial intelligence methods to clinical and public health problems.

## Research Themes

### Biostatistics and Statistical Modeling
Regression modeling, Bayesian methods, multilevel models, survival analysis, and clinical prediction models.

### Clinical Epidemiology
Design and analysis of clinical and observational studies, disease risk modeling, and evidence generation for healthcare decision-making.

### Public Health Analytics
Maternal and child health, malaria burden, infectious diseases, non-communicable diseases, and health service utilization.

### Artificial Intelligence in Health
Machine learning, interpretable AI, federated learning, privacy-preserving analytics, and AI-supported clinical research.

### Reproducible Research
Use of R, Quarto, GitHub, and open science tools for transparent and reproducible health research.

## Current Research Direction

My current work emphasizes Bayesian spatiotemporal modeling, malaria burden estimation, maternal and newborn health analytics, and federated learning for privacy-preserving healthcare research.
